layers.name: Public API
layers.summary_zh: AF 全局入口、Session 与 SessionDelegate——发起请求并桥接 URLSession 回调
layers.summary_en: The AF entry point, Session, and SessionDelegate — issue requests and bridge URLSession callbacks

classes.name: Session
classes.description_zh: 创建并管理所有 Request 的生命周期,统一处理排队、拦截、信任评估、重定向与缓存。
classes.description_en: Creates and manages the lifetime of every Request, centralizing queuing, interception, trust evaluation, redirect and cache handling.

classes.name: SessionDelegate
classes.description_zh: 实现各类 URLSessionDelegate 回调,把 URLSession 事件桥接到对应的 Request。
classes.description_en: Implements the URLSessionDelegate callbacks, bridging URLSession events to the matching Request.

classes.name: SessionStateProvider
classes.description_zh: 向 SessionDelegate 暴露 Session 的状态:信任管理器、凭据与任务映射。
classes.description_en: Exposes Session state — trust manager, credentials, and task map — to the SessionDelegate.

layers.name: Concurrency Integration
layers.summary_zh: 把请求暴露为 async/await 任务与 Combine 发布者
layers.summary_en: Exposes requests as async/await tasks and Combine publishers

classes.name: DataResponsePublisher
classes.description_zh: 把 DataRequest 的 DataResponse 包装为 Combine Publisher。
classes.description_en: A Combine Publisher emitting a DataRequest's DataResponse.

classes.name: DownloadResponsePublisher
classes.description_zh: 把 DownloadRequest 的 DownloadResponse 包装为 Combine Publisher。
classes.description_en: A Combine Publisher emitting a DownloadRequest's DownloadResponse.

classes.name: publishResponse

classes.description_zh: 在 DataRequest 上提供 publishData/publishString 等 Combine 发布入口。
classes.description_en: Combine entry points (publishData/publishString/…) exposed on DataRequest.

classes.description_zh: 提供把响应解码为 Decodable 的 Combine 发布入口。
classes.description_en: A Combine entry point publishing the response decoded into a Decodable.

classes.description_zh: 把 DataStreamRequest 的流式数据包装为 Combine Publisher。
classes.description_en: A Combine entry point publishing a DataStreamRequest's streamed values.

classes.name: DataTask
classes.description_zh: 可 await 的句柄,暴露 DataRequest 的响应、值与进度。
classes.description_en: An awaitable handle exposing a DataRequest's response, value, and progress.

classes.name: DownloadTask
classes.description_zh: 可 await 的句柄,暴露 DownloadRequest 的响应与下载文件 URL。
classes.description_en: An awaitable handle exposing a DownloadRequest's response and downloaded file URL.

classes.name: DataStreamTask
classes.description_zh: 可 await、可异步迭代的句柄,消费 DataStreamRequest 的数据流。
classes.description_en: An awaitable, async-iterable handle consuming a DataStreamRequest's stream.

classes.name: WebSocketTask
classes.description_zh: 可 await 的句柄,异步收发 WebSocket 消息。
classes.description_en: An awaitable handle for asynchronously sending and receiving WebSocket messages.

classes.name: StreamOf
classes.description_zh: 单次迭代的 AsyncSequence,承载并发流的值与取消语义。
classes.description_en: A single-pass AsyncSequence carrying a concurrency stream's values and cancellation.

classes.name: uploadProgress
classes.signature: public func uploadProgress(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<Progress>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<Progress>

classes.name: downloadProgress
classes.signature: public func downloadProgress(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<Progress>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<Progress>

classes.name: urlRequests
classes.signature: public func urlRequests(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<URLRequest>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<URLRequest>

classes.name: urlSessionTasks
classes.signature: public func urlSessionTasks(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<URLSessionTask>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<URLSessionTask>

classes.name: cURLDescriptions
classes.signature: public func cURLDescriptions(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<String>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<String>

classes.name: stream
classes.signature: fileprivate func stream<T>(of type: T.Type = T.self, bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<T>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded, yielder: @escaping (StreamOf<T>.Continuation) -> Void) -> StreamOf<T>
classes.description_zh: 把请求的流式输出桥接为 Swift async 流。
classes.description_en: Bridges a request's streamed output into a Swift async stream.

classes.name: httpResponses
classes.display_name: Features.Concurrency.httpResponses public func httpResponses(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<HTTPURLResponse>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<HTTPURLResponse>
classes.signature: public func httpResponses(bufferingPolicy: StreamOf<HTTPURLResponse>.BufferingPolicy = .unbounded) -> StreamOf<HTTPURLResponse>

classes.signature: public func streamTask() -> DataStreamTask

classes.name: webSocketTask
classes.signature: public func webSocketTask() -> WebSocketTask

classes.name: streamCompletionQueue
classes.signature: fileprivate static func streamCompletionQueue(forRequestID id: UUID) -> DispatchQueue
classes.description_zh: 指定并发流完成回调所用的 DispatchQueue。
classes.description_en: Sets the DispatchQueue used for a concurrency stream's completion callback.

layers.name: Request Model
layers.summary_zh: Request 基类及 Data/Download/Upload/Stream/WebSocket 子类——请求生命周期状态机
layers.summary_en: The Request base class and its Data/Download/Upload/Stream/WebSocket subclasses — the request lifecycle state machine

classes.name: DataRequest
classes.description_zh: 用 URLSessionDataTask 把响应数据下载到内存的 Request 子类。
classes.description_en: A Request subclass that downloads response Data into memory via URLSessionDataTask.

classes.name: DataStreamRequest
classes.description_zh: 通过 Handler 闭包流式传递 HTTP 响应数据的 Request 子类。
classes.description_en: A Request subclass that streams HTTP response Data through a Handler closure.

classes.name: DataStreamSerializer
classes.description_zh: 把流入的 Data 序列化为输出值的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol that serializes incoming streamed Data into output values.

classes.name: DecodableStreamSerializer
classes.description_zh: 用 DataPreprocessor + DataDecoder 把流数据解码为 Decodable 的流序列化器。
classes.description_en: A stream serializer decoding streamed Data into a Decodable via DataPreprocessor and DataDecoder.

classes.name: PassthroughStreamSerializer
classes.description_zh: 不做任何序列化、原样透传 Data 的流序列化器。
classes.description_en: A stream serializer that passes incoming Data through unchanged.

classes.name: StringStreamSerializer
classes.description_zh: 把流入 Data 解码为 UTF-8 字符串的流序列化器。
classes.description_en: A stream serializer decoding incoming Data into UTF-8 Strings.

classes.name: DownloadRequest
classes.description_zh: 用 URLSessionDownloadTask 把数据下载到磁盘文件的 Request 子类。
classes.description_en: A Request subclass that downloads Data to a file on disk via URLSessionDownloadTask.

classes.name: Request
classes.description_zh: 所有 Alamofire 请求类型的公共基类,承载共享状态、委托与回调处理。
classes.description_en: The common superclass of all Alamofire request types, holding shared state, delegate, and callback handling.

classes.name: UploadRequest
classes.description_zh: 用 URLSessionUploadTask 从内存/文件/流上传数据的 DataRequest 子类。
classes.description_en: A DataRequest subclass that uploads Data from memory, file, or stream via URLSessionUploadTask.

classes.name: createUploadable
classes.signature: public func createUploadable() throws -> UploadRequest.Uploadable

classes.name: WebSocketRequest
classes.description_zh: 实验性的 WebSocket 请求类型,异步收发帧消息。
classes.description_en: An experimental Request type for sending and receiving WebSocket frames.

layers.name: Response & Serialization
layers.summary_zh: 响应封装、Decodable/JSON/String 序列化器与响应校验
layers.summary_en: Response wrappers, Decodable/JSON/String serializers, and response validation

classes.name: DataResponse
classes.description_zh: 存储 DataRequest/UploadRequest 序列化响应的全部相关值。
classes.description_en: Stores all values associated with a serialized DataRequest/UploadRequest response.

classes.name: DownloadResponse
classes.description_zh: 存储下载请求序列化响应的全部相关值。
classes.description_en: Stores all values associated with a serialized download response.

classes.name: indentingNewlines
classes.signature: fileprivate func indentingNewlines(by spaceCount: Int = 4) -> String

classes.name: DataResponseSerializerProtocol
classes.description_zh: 所有 data 响应序列化器须遵循的协议。
classes.description_en: The protocol all data-response serializers conform to.

classes.name: DownloadResponseSerializerProtocol
classes.description_zh: 所有 download 响应序列化器须遵循的协议。
classes.description_en: The protocol all download-response serializers conform to.

classes.name: ResponseSerializer
classes.description_zh: 同时处理 data 与 download 响应的序列化器基协议。
classes.description_en: The base serializer protocol handling both data and download responses.

classes.name: DataPreprocessor
classes.description_zh: 在序列化前对 Data 做预处理的协议(如剥离 XSSI 前缀)。
classes.description_en: A protocol that preprocesses Data before serialization (e.g. stripping an XSSI prefix).

classes.name: URLResponseSerializer
classes.description_zh: 只做错误检查并确保下载 fileURL 存在的 download 序列化器。
classes.description_en: A download serializer that only checks errors and ensures the downloaded fileURL is present.

classes.name: DataResponseSerializer
classes.description_zh: 做最小检查后原样返回响应 Data 的序列化器。
classes.description_en: A serializer that does minimal checking and returns the response Data as-is.

classes.name: StringResponseSerializer
classes.description_zh: 把响应数据按编码解码为 String 的序列化器。
classes.description_en: A serializer that decodes the response data into a String.

classes.name: JSONResponseSerializer
classes.description_zh: (已弃用)把响应解析为 JSON 对象的序列化器。

classes.description_zh: 用 DataDecoder 把响应数据解码为 Decodable 类型的序列化器。
classes.description_en: A serializer that decodes the response data into a Decodable type via a DataDecoder.

layers.name: Interception & Retry
layers.summary_zh: 请求适配器、重试器、重定向、缓存与压缩处理的责任链中间件

classes.name: Authenticator
classes.description_zh: 用凭据认证 URLRequest 并在需要时刷新凭据的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol that authenticates URLRequests with a credential and refreshes it when required.

classes.name: AuthenticationInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 管理请求认证的排队与线程复杂度,依赖 Authenticator 完成认证与凭据刷新。
classes.description_en: Manages the queuing and threading of request authentication, delegating to an Authenticator for auth and credential refresh.

classes.name: CachedResponseHandler
classes.description_zh: 决定数据任务是否将响应存入缓存的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol deciding whether a data task stores its HTTP response in the cache.

classes.name: OfflineRetrier
classes.description_zh: 用 NWPathMonitor 监测网络恢复后重试失败请求的重试器。
classes.description_en: A retrier that uses NWPathMonitor to retry failed requests once connectivity is restored.

classes.name: startListening
classes.signature: fileprivate mutating func startListening(onResult: @escaping @Sendable (_ result: PathMonitor.Result) -> Void)

classes.name: cleanupMonitor
classes.signature: fileprivate mutating func cleanupMonitor()

classes.name: offlineRetrier
classes.signature: public static func offlineRetrier( monitor: @autoclosure @escaping () -> NWPathMonitor = NWPathMonitor(), maximumWait: DispatchTimeInterval = OfflineRetrier.defaultWait, isOfflineError: @escaping @Sendable (_ error: any Error) -> Bool = OfflineRetrier.defaultIsOfflineError ) -> OfflineRetrier

classes.name: RedirectHandler
classes.description_zh: 决定如何处理服务器 HTTP 重定向响应的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol deciding how a server's HTTP redirect response is handled.

classes.name: DeflateRequestCompressor
classes.description_zh: 用 deflate 压缩请求体的 RequestInterceptor。
classes.description_en: A RequestInterceptor that deflate-compresses the request body.

classes.name: deflateCompressor
classes.signature: public static func deflateCompressor( duplicateHeaderBehavior: DeflateRequestCompressor.DuplicateHeaderBehavior = .error, shouldCompressBodyData: @escaping @Sendable (_ bodyData: Data) -> Bool = { _ in true } ) -> DeflateRequestCompressor

classes.name: RequestAdapter
classes.description_zh: 在请求发出前检查并可选改写 URLRequest 的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol that inspects and optionally adapts a URLRequest before it is issued.

classes.name: RequestRetrier
classes.description_zh: 在请求出错后判定是否重试的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol that decides whether a failed request should be retried.

classes.name: RequestInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 同时提供 RequestAdapter 与 RequestRetrier 能力的拦截器协议。
classes.description_en: The interceptor protocol providing both RequestAdapter and RequestRetrier capabilities.

classes.name: Adapter
classes.description_zh: 基于闭包的 RequestAdapter 实现。
classes.description_en: A closure-based RequestAdapter.

classes.name: Retrier
classes.description_zh: 基于闭包的 RequestRetrier 实现。
classes.description_en: A closure-based RequestRetrier.

classes.name: Interceptor
classes.description_zh: 可组合多个 RequestAdapter 与 RequestRetrier 的拦截器。
classes.description_en: An interceptor composing multiple RequestAdapters and RequestRetriers.

classes.name: RetryPolicy
classes.description_zh: 对允许的方法/状态码与网络错误按指数退避重试的策略。
classes.description_en: A retry policy using exponential backoff for allowed HTTP methods/status codes and certain network errors.

classes.name: retryPolicy

layers.name: HTTP & Encoding
layers.summary_zh: HTTP 方法/头部、参数编码器与 multipart 表单——构造 URLRequest
layers.summary_en: HTTP methods/headers, parameter encoders, and multipart form data — building the URLRequest

classes.name: HTTPHeaders

classes.description_en: An order-preserving, case-insensitive collection of HTTP headers.

classes.name: HTTPHeader
classes.description_zh: 单个 HTTP 头的名/值对表示。
classes.description_en: A single HTTP header name/value pair.

classes.description_en: A type-safe representation of an HTTP method (GET/POST/…).

classes.name: ParameterEncoder
classes.description_zh: 把任意 Encodable 类型编码进 URLRequest 的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol that encodes any Encodable type into a URLRequest.

classes.name: JSONParameterEncoder
classes.description_zh: 把参数编码为 JSON 请求体的 ParameterEncoder。
classes.description_en: A ParameterEncoder that encodes parameters as a JSON request body.

classes.name: URLEncodedFormParameterEncoder
classes.description_zh: 把参数编码为 URL 编码表单的 ParameterEncoder。
classes.description_en: A ParameterEncoder that encodes parameters as a URL-encoded form.

classes.name: ParameterEncoding
classes.description_zh: 定义参数如何施加到 URLRequest 的(旧式)协议。
classes.description_en: The (legacy) protocol defining how parameters are applied to a URLRequest.

classes.name: URLEncoding
classes.description_zh: 把参数编码进 URL 查询或表单体的 ParameterEncoding。
classes.description_en: A ParameterEncoding that encodes parameters into the URL query or form body.

classes.name: JSONEncoding
classes.description_zh: 用 JSONSerialization 把参数编码为 JSON 体的 ParameterEncoding。
classes.description_en: A ParameterEncoding that uses JSONSerialization to encode parameters as a JSON body.

classes.name: URLRequestConvertible
classes.description_zh: 可安全构造 URLRequest 的类型所遵循的协议(路由器模式)。
classes.description_en: A protocol adopted by types that can safely build a URLRequest — the router pattern.

layers.name: Security (TLS)
layers.summary_zh: 服务器信任评估:证书与公钥固定、吊销校验
layers.summary_en: Server trust evaluation — certificate/public-key pinning and revocation checks

classes.name: ServerTrustManager
classes.description_zh: 管理 host → ServerTrustEvaluating 的映射,按主机选择信任评估器。
classes.description_en: Manages the host→ServerTrustEvaluating mapping and selects a trust evaluator per host.

classes.name: ServerTrustEvaluating
classes.description_zh: 描述服务器信任评估 API 的协议。
classes.description_en: The protocol describing the server-trust evaluation API.

classes.name: RevocationTrustEvaluator
classes.description_zh: 在默认校验之上额外检查证书吊销状态的评估器。
classes.description_en: A trust evaluator that additionally checks certificate revocation on top of default validation.

classes.name: PinnedCertificatesTrustEvaluator
classes.description_zh: 用固定证书校验服务器信任的评估器(证书固定)。
classes.description_en: A trust evaluator that validates server trust against pinned certificates.

classes.name: PublicKeysTrustEvaluator
classes.description_zh: 用固定公钥校验服务器信任的评估器(公钥固定)。
classes.description_en: A trust evaluator that validates server trust against pinned public keys.

classes.name: CompositeTrustEvaluator
classes.description_zh: 组合多个评估器、全部通过才算可信的评估器。
classes.description_en: A trust evaluator composing several evaluators, trusting only if all of them pass.

layers.name: Monitoring & Reachability
layers.summary_zh: 事件监控钩子、通知与网络可达性观测
layers.summary_en: Event-monitoring hooks, notifications, and network reachability observation

classes.name: AlamofireNotifications
classes.description_zh: 把请求生命周期事件转发为 NotificationCenter 通知的 EventMonitor。
classes.description_en: An EventMonitor that forwards request lifetime events as NotificationCenter notifications.

classes.name: postNotification
classes.signature: func postNotification(named name: Notification.Name, with request: Request)

classes.name: EventMonitor
classes.description_zh: 描述 Alamofire 内部生命周期事件(含 URLSession 委托事件)的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol outlining Alamofire's internal lifetime events, including URLSession delegate events.

classes.name: CompositeEventMonitor
classes.description_zh: 组合多个 EventMonitor 并在各自队列上分发事件。
classes.description_en: Composes multiple EventMonitors and dispatches events on their respective queues.

classes.name: ClosureEventMonitor
classes.description_zh: 允许用闭包接收选定事件的 EventMonitor。
classes.description_en: An EventMonitor whose selected events are delivered to optional closures.

classes.name: NetworkReachabilityManager
classes.description_zh: 监听网络可达性变化,用于诊断或连接恢复后重试。
classes.description_en: Observes network reachability changes, for diagnostics or retry-on-reconnect.

layers.name: Foundation
layers.summary_zh: 错误模型、线程安全原语、.af 扩展命名空间与 Foundation 类型扩展
layers.summary_en: The error model, thread-safety primitives, the .af extension namespace, and Foundation type extensions

classes.name: AFError
classes.description_zh: Alamofire 的统一错误类型,按类别携带各自的失败原因。
classes.description_en: Alamofire's unified error type, carrying categorized failure reasons.

classes.name: Lock
classes.description_zh: 抽象底层互斥锁的协议。
classes.description_en: A protocol abstracting an underlying mutual-exclusion lock.

classes.name: UnfairLock
classes.description_zh: os_unfair_lock 的封装实现。
classes.description_en: An os_unfair_lock wrapper.

classes.description_zh: 为所有 AlamofireExtended 类型提供 .af 扩展点的泛型容器。
classes.description_en: A generic container providing the .af extension point for all AlamofireExtended types.

layer_groups.name: Entry Surfaces
layer_groups.summary_zh: 用户直接调用的两种入口:Session 闭包式 API 与 async/Combine 适配
layer_groups.summary_en: The two consumer entry points — the Session closure API and the async/Combine adapters

layer_groups.name: Connection Services
layer_groups.summary_zh: 连接层横切服务:TLS 信任评估与网络监控/可达性
layer_groups.summary_en: Connection-level cross-cutting services — TLS trust evaluation and network monitoring/reachability

flows.name_zh: 一次请求的完整生命周期
flows.description_zh: 从 AF.request 到拿到 DataResponse:Session 创建请求、拦截器适配、URLSession 执行、委托回调、序列化返回。
flows.description_en: From AF.request to a DataResponse — Session builds the request, the interceptor adapts it, URLSession executes, the delegate routes callbacks, and the serializer returns the result.

flows.description_zh: RequestInterceptor 把适配(RequestAdapter)与重试(RequestRetrier)组合成责任链——认证、压缩、退避重试、断网重试都在此挂接。
flows.description_en: RequestInterceptor composes adaptation (RequestAdapter) and retry (RequestRetrier) into a chain — authentication, compression, backoff retry, and offline retry all hook in here.

flows.description_zh: 请求完成后,响应数据先经 DataPreprocessor 预处理,再由 ResponseSerializer 解码为 String/JSON/Decodable,最终封装成 DataResponse。
flows.description_en: Once a request completes, response Data is preprocessed by a DataPreprocessor, decoded by a ResponseSerializer into String/JSON/Decodable, and wrapped in a DataResponse.

flows.description_zh: 面对 TLS 挑战时,SessionDelegate 经 ServerTrustManager 选出主机对应的评估器,由 ServerTrustEvaluating 分派到证书固定/公钥固定/吊销/组合等策略。
flows.description_en: On a TLS challenge, the SessionDelegate asks the ServerTrustManager for the host's evaluator, and ServerTrustEvaluating dispatches to certificate-pinning / public-key-pinning / revocation / composite strategies.

steps.label_zh: 通过 或 抛出 AFError

flows.description_zh: DataRequest.serializingDecodable 把请求包装成可 await 的 DataTask,await .value 时触发序列化并在 async 上下文取消时取消底层请求。
flows.description_en: DataRequest.serializingDecodable wraps a request into an awaitable DataTask; awaiting .value drives serialization and cancels the underlying request when the async context is cancelled.

flows.description_zh: Session.upload 把各部分追加进 MultipartFormData,经 MultipartUpload 编码为可上传体,再交给 UploadRequest 通过 URLSessionUploadTask 发出。
flows.description_en: Session.upload appends parts into MultipartFormData, MultipartUpload encodes them into an uploadable body, and UploadRequest issues it via a URLSessionUploadTask.
